# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
#   DC_Cut / Dispersion Cut — Python dependencies
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
#
#   Required Python:  3.10+  (tested on 3.11 – 3.13)
#
#   Install into the repo venv via:
#       pip install -r requirements.txt
#
#   Or use the bundled installer which creates the venv for you:
#       dc_cut\install.bat        (Windows)
#
#   After install, launch the app with the auto-generated launcher:
#       Dispersion_Cut.bat        (in the repo parent folder)
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# ── Core scientific stack ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
numpy>=1.24,<3.0
scipy>=1.10
pandas>=2.0

# ── GUI framework ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Matplotlib's qt_compat bridges to whichever Qt binding is installed.
# PySide6 is the recommended Qt6 binding for this application.
PySide6>=6.5
matplotlib>=3.7

# ── I/O & export ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# python-pptx: PowerPoint export of publication figures.
python-pptx>=0.6.23

# ── Imaging (Pillow is transitive via matplotlib, listed explicitly so the
#            SW_Transform image utilities also work stand-alone) ────────────
Pillow>=9.0
